ddls:
CREATE TABLE "lipid_species" (
  "lipid_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lipid species */,
  "lipid_name" TEXT /* Name of the lipid species */,
  "molecular_formula" TEXT /* Molecular formula of the lipid species */,
  "molecular_weight" REAL /* Molecular weight of the lipid species */,
  "ionization_form" INTEGER /* ID of the ionization form */,
  "fragmentation_pattern" INTEGER /* ID of the fragmentation pattern */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the lipid species */,
  "species_type" TEXT /* Type of lipid species (e.g., phospholipids, sphingolipids) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Biological source of the lipid (e.g., human, plant, animal) */,
  "reference_database_id" TEXT /* ID from an external lipid database */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the lipid species entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the lipid species entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lipid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_species_fragmentation_pattern FOREIGN KEY ("fragmentation_pattern") REFERENCES fragmentation_patterns ("fragment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_species_ionization_form FOREIGN KEY ("ionization_form") REFERENCES ionization_forms ("ion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ionization_forms" (
  "ion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ionization form */,
  "ion_name" TEXT /* Name of the ionization form */,
  "ion_type" TEXT /* Type of ionization (e.g., M+H, M-H) */,
  "ion_description" TEXT /* Description of the ionization form */,
  "ion_charge" TEXT /* Charge of the ion (e.g., +1, -1) */,
  "ion_accuracy" TEXT /* Precision of the ion mass measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the ionization form entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the ionization form entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "fragmentation_patterns" (
  "fragment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fragmentation pattern */,
  "fragment_name" TEXT /* Name of the fragmentation pattern */,
  "fragment_description" TEXT /* Description of the fragmentation pattern */,
  "fragment_charge" TEXT /* Charge of the fragment (e.g., +1, -1) */,
  "fragment_accuracy" TEXT /* Precision of the fragment mass measurement */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the fragmentation pattern entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the fragmentation pattern entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("fragment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lipid_ionization" (
  "lipid_ion_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ionization data entry */,
  "lipid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid species */,
  "ion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ionization form */,
  "ion_mass" REAL /* Mass of the ion */,
  "ion_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the ion */,
  "ion_accuracy" TEXT /* Precision of the ion mass measurement */,
  "ion_retention_time" REAL /* Retention time of the ion in chromatography */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the ionization data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the ionization data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lipid_ion_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_ionization_lipid_id FOREIGN KEY ("lipid_id") REFERENCES lipid_species ("lipid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_ionization_ion_id FOREIGN KEY ("ion_id") REFERENCES ionization_forms ("ion_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lipid_fragmentation" (
  "lipid_fragment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each fragmentation data entry */,
  "lipid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid species */,
  "fragment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fragmentation pattern */,
  "fragment_mass" REAL /* Mass of the fragment */,
  "fragment_intensity" REAL /* Intensity of the fragment */,
  "fragment_accuracy" TEXT /* Precision of the fragment mass measurement */,
  "fragment_retention_time" REAL /* Retention time of the fragment in chromatography */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the fragmentation data entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the fragmentation data entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lipid_fragment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_fragmentation_fragment_id FOREIGN KEY ("fragment_id") REFERENCES fragmentation_patterns ("fragment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lipid_fragmentation_lipid_id FOREIGN KEY ("lipid_id") REFERENCES lipid_species ("lipid_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "experiment_name" TEXT /* Name of the experiment */,
  "experiment_date" TEXT /* Date the experiment was conducted */,
  "instrument_used" TEXT /* Instrument used for the experiment */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the experiment */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator who conducted the experiment */,
  "experiment_status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., planned, ongoing, completed) */,
  "experiment_location" TEXT /* Location where the experiment was conducted */,
  "experiment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the experiment entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the experiment entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiments_operator_id FOREIGN KEY ("operator_id") REFERENCES operators ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "operators" (
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each operator */,
  "operator_name" TEXT /* Name of the operator */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the operator */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the operator (e.g., researcher, technician) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the operator belongs to */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the operator entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the operator entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("operator_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "samples" (
  "sample_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sample */,
  "sample_name" TEXT /* Name of the sample */,
  "collection_date" TEXT /* Date the sample was collected */,
  "storage_conditions" TEXT /* Conditions under which the sample was stored */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the sample was used in */,
  "sample_type" TEXT /* Type of sample (e.g., blood, tissue, cell culture) */,
  "sample_volume" REAL /* Volume of the sample */,
  "sample_concentration" REAL /* Concentration of the sample */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the sample entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the sample entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sample_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_samples_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "experiment_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment result */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment */,
  "lipid_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lipid species */,
  "ion_id" INTEGER /* ID of the ionization form */,
  "fragment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the fragmentation pattern */,
  "result_value" REAL /* Value of the result */,
  "result_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the result value */,
  "result_accuracy" TEXT /* Precision of the result value */,
  "result_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the result */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for when the result entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp for the last update to the result entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_lipid_id FOREIGN KEY ("lipid_id") REFERENCES lipid_species ("lipid_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_fragment_id FOREIGN KEY ("fragment_id") REFERENCES fragmentation_patterns ("fragment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_experiment_results_ion_id FOREIGN KEY ("ion_id") REFERENCES ionization_forms ("ion_id")
)
